user.title: Nordic Parcel
user.description: Select the parcel carrier to set up.

bring.title: Bring (Posten Norge)
bring.description: Enter your Mybring API credentials. Get them at {docs_url}

postnord.title: Postnord
postnord.description: Enter your Postnord API key. Get one at {docs_url}

helthjem.title: Helthjem
helthjem.description: Enter your Helthjem API credentials. Contact integrations@helthjem.no or see {docs_url}

reauth_bring.title: Re-authenticate Bring
reauth_bring.description: Your Bring credentials have expired or become invalid. Please re-enter your API credentials.

reauth_postnord.title: Re-authenticate Postnord
reauth_postnord.description: Your Postnord credentials have expired or become invalid. Please re-enter your API key.

reauth_helthjem.title: Re-authenticate Helthjem
reauth_helthjem.description: Your Helthjem credentials have expired or become invalid. Please re-enter your API credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the carrier API.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check and try again.

abort.already_configured: This carrier account is already configured.

add_tracking.name: Add tracking
add_tracking.description: Start tracking a parcel by its tracking number.

tracking_id.name: Tracking ID
tracking_id.description: The tracking number from the carrier.

carrier.name: Carrier
carrier.description: Which carrier to use. If omitted, the tracking number is added to the first configured carrier.

remove_tracking.name: Remove tracking
remove_tracking.description: Stop tracking a parcel and remove its sensor.

tracking_id.name: Tracking ID
tracking_id.description: The tracking number to stop tracking.
